EV6 Repeated Field Notes

Field note 1: EV6 charging started normally after the driver warmed the battery
with a short highway segment.

Field note 2: EV6 range estimates were lower during freezing rain and improved
after tire pressure was corrected.

Field note 3: EV6 cabin preconditioning reduced windshield fogging during the
morning commute.

Field note 4: EV6 route planning should include chargers with reliable recent
check-ins rather than only the highest advertised power.

Field note 5: EV6 driver feedback mentioned that charging stops felt shorter
when the navigation system preconditioned the battery.

Field note 6: EV6 service staff should distinguish ordinary winter range loss
from a battery warranty claim.

Field note 7: EV6 charging logs showed no fault codes even though the driver
reported a slower-than-expected session.

Field note 8: EV6 notes in this file are intentionally repetitive so that a
chunk-level search can return many strong chunks from one source file.
